quality.rationale: 通过测地线条件消去四维加速度项，将费米-沃克输运直接简化为平行输运，逻辑链条完整且对应非旋转参考系的物理实际

origin.question: Problem 7.19. Show that Fermi-Walker transport along a geodesic curve is the same as parallel transport.
origin.answer: Fermi-Walker transport law reduces to $\nabla_{\mathbf{u}} \mathbf{x} = 0$, which is the parallel transport equation.
origin.solution:
Fermi-Walker transport has the differential equation$$
abla_{\mathbf {u}} \mathbf {x} = (\mathbf {u} \otimes \mathbf {a} - \mathbf {a} \otimes \mathbf {u}) \cdot \mathbf {x},$$where $\mathbf{u}$ is the tangent vector to the curve and $\mathbf{a} = 
abla_{\mathbf{u}}\mathbf{u} \equiv \mathrm{D}\mathbf{u} / \mathrm{d}	au$ . If the curve is a geodesic, it satisfies the geodesic equation $
abla_{\mathbf{u}}\mathbf{u} = 0$ , so the Fermi-Walker transport law becomes$$
abla_{\mathbf {u}} \mathbf {x} = 0,$$which is just the parallel transport equation.
